feature_name: Polish batch: FOUC fix, daily skip investigation, draggable lists

completed_tasks.title: Fix daily skip bug -- swap to nextRecurringDueAfterToday
completed_tasks.description: In skip() in tasks.ts, change nextRecurringDueAfterCurrent(t) to nextRecurringDueAfterToday(t). Add three new unit tests: skip daily 1-day overdue, skip daily 3-day overdue, skip daily with punted_from_due_date.
completed_tasks.done_when: skip() calls nextRecurringDueAfterToday; three new tests pass; all existing skip/recurrence tests pass; npm run test clean

completed_tasks.title: FOUC fix -- inline theme/font script in app.html
completed_tasks.description: Add synchronous inline script to app.html head that reads localStorage ui-preferences, validates against hardcoded theme/font whitelists, sets data-ui-theme and data-ui-font on html element. Add whitelist-sync unit test. Add cross-reference comments in both app.html and preferences.ts.
completed_tasks.done_when: Inline script sets theme/font attributes before first paint; SSR-safe guard present; whitelist-sync test passes; npm run check + lint + test all pass

completed_tasks.title: Draggable lists -- add HTML5 DnD to sidebar list items
completed_tasks.description: Add native HTML5 drag-and-drop to sidebar list items in Sidebar.svelte. Gate on adminMode && listSortMode === 'manual'. My Day excluded. Compute reorder on drop using sortByOrder + manualOrderValue, call lists.updateRemote(). CSS-only visual feedback (.dragging, .drag-over classes).
completed_tasks.done_when: Admin manual-sort lists are draggable; drop reorders correctly via updateRemote; My Day pinned and non-draggable; alpha/contributor mode has no drag; CSS classes only; arrow buttons in settings unchanged; npm run check + lint pass

completed_tasks.title: Draggable lists -- E2E smoke test
completed_tasks.description: Add one Playwright @smoke E2E test: as admin in manual sort mode, drag list A below list B, verify sidebar order changes. Test in smoke.spec.ts or new sidebar-drag.spec.ts.
completed_tasks.done_when: One new @smoke test passes on Chromium via npm run test:e2e:smoke; all existing E2E smoke tests still pass

history.note: Feature initiated with three items: FOUC fix, daily skip recurrence investigation, draggable lists
Moved to discovery; PM inbox written for requirements gathering
Discovery complete. Exec plan written to docs/exec-plans/active/2026-05-08-polish-fouc-skip-drag.md. Requirements, scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria defined for all three items.
Moved to design. PE inbox written for technical design of all three items.

Design complete. All three items designed: FOUC inline script in app.html, daily skip bug confirmed and fix specified (swap nextRecurringDueAfterCurrent for nextRecurringDueAfterToday in skip()), draggable lists via native HTML5 DnD in Sidebar.svelte. Implementation order: skip fix -> FOUC -> drag.

Task breakdown complete. 4 tasks: T1 skip fix (1 line + 3 tests), T2 FOUC inline script + whitelist sync test, T3 sidebar DnD implementation, T4 DnD E2E smoke test. Order: T1 -> T2 -> T3 -> T4 (T4 depends on T3).
T1 built and verified. Routing T2 (FOUC fix - inline theme/font script in app.html) to software-developer.
T2 built (FOUC fix). Routing T3 (Draggable lists - HTML5 DnD in sidebar) to software-developer.
T3 built (Draggable lists - HTML5 DnD). Routing T4 (Draggable lists E2E smoke test) to software-developer.
All 4 tasks built (T1-T4). Routing to build-specialist for full quality gate run and quality-assurance for code review.

VERIFICATION COMPLETE: All quality gates passed. npm lint (PASS), npm check (PASS), npm test (359/359 PASS), npm test:e2e:smoke (17/17 PASS), cargo fmt (PASS), cargo clippy (PASS), cargo test (40/40 PASS).

QA code review APPROVED. One W2 finding tracked to tech debt (async handleDrop in Sidebar.svelte has silently discarded Promise). All 4 tasks marked verified. Routing to PM for acceptance validation against exec plan criteria.
ACCEPTANCE COMPLETE: All 23 acceptance criteria verified PASS. PM sign-off given. Feature ready for /done.
